chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl STRA 1094 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.2340/2023 3. For hearing of main case 13.01.2026 Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for the applicant Messrs. Vishwa Mittar and Zubair Ahmed, advocates for respondent It is jointly submitted that the question before the court is covered against the applicant and in favour of the respondent vide judgment of the honourable Supreme Court in Civil Petition No.4579 of 2023 ( Allama Iqbal Open University vs. Commissioner Inland Revenue, Withholding Tax Zone, RTO, Islamabad), therefore, the present reference application may be dismissed. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
